reviews.review_text: Small, nice and clean
Great little camp site. Very friendly staff, perfect for an overnight in a calm place!

Good park
Management very helpful
Great little park excellent hosts would have loved to return after the Motorhome service and repairs but they were booked out. We will go back one day.

Excellent park for a quite and relaxing time Nigel and Tania were excellent hosts the town had all the needs that you need from supermarket to butcher  plus hotel, bakery all good at meeting your needs

$46 per night for 2 on powered slab site. Quiet small park sandwiched between a skate board area and beach. Possibly tide was right in when I looked, but not a beach you can sunbathe on or walk along. Managers are helpful and friendly. Clean modern amenities, hot water is HOT, decent shower pressure in mens though heard women's wasn't so great. There's a very basic kitchen, one hotplate, microwave, kettle and toaster. Sign says there's a fridge in laundry, but had no need of either, so can't comment. Given prices of other parks along that stretch of coast you could do a lot worse than stay here. Overall, pretty good.

This was our second visit to Beachmere Caravan Park.
We were very happy to see that the standards are still very high.
The managers are friendly and welcoming.
The amenities are kept in spotless condition and the park is well maintained.
A very enjoyable relaxing week.
We'll be back.
Did not enjoy visit

We stayed here for one night on our way to Brisbane and were genuinely impressed. The park is beautifully maintained, the facilities are spotless, and the whole area is wonderfully peaceful. Plus, the water is just a short walk away.

The staff couldn’t have been kinder or more helpful. We had sent a parcel from Beachmere to Germany that was by mistake returned to the park after we had already left for Sydney. Tania went above and beyond by taking it back to the post office and sending it out again for us. We are incredibly grateful!

A perfect stop along the route to Brisbane. Highly recommended, and we’d happily come back anytime!

Such a lovely quiet park. Even being beside a road, the commuters are considerate. No pets.
Amenities are very well looked after. Bookings essential. Managers are lovely and very caring of the whole park and each site is well maintained and level and spacious.
Power & water off peak approx $40/n 2 adults. November 2025. You need to ring them to book. Deposit at time of booking. Balance paid on arrival. Five Stars!! We will keep this a secret!!! Ssshhhh 🤣

Stopped here for one night on our tour of Queensland. Park is spotless, amenities and abolition block also spotless. Lovely quiet area within walking distance to water. Staff super nice and helpful. Thanks.
Cute little van / camping park in nice setting with birdsong in the morning. Friendly and approachable staff which made our 2 night stay really positive.

Small park with super friendly staff and amazingly clean facilities with really hot water, great water pressure too . Everything is thought of down to book exchange in the laundry. Heaps of washing line space. Will return one day. Thank xx heaps

Stayed overnight on way to Brisbane.
Lovely little uncrowded park near the sea. Not fancy but clean and very functional.
Nice management.
Will stay again.
Pleasant place- cafes and beautiful walks all in one area.
Great little park. Spotless amenities and friendly staff. Just across the from the sea.
Lovely quiet park, fantastic managers, great facilities....a real hidden gem. We are definately going back and will be staying longer.

Beachmere Caravan Park was such a lovely little stop! 🏕️💛

Super friendly and inviting staff – honestly 10/10 for the welcome 🙌😊
Amenities were very clean, and the laundry was a good size 👕🧼
Camp kitchen had a couple of benches – nothing fancy but totally decent for what you need 🍳👍
Small park but really peaceful and well-kept – perfect for chilling and unwinding 😌🌿

Beach is just a short stroll away 🌊 and you’re close to everything: local parks, IGA, Domino’s, cafes, the hotel and the bowlo 🍕☕🍻

Would happily stop here again for a cruisy beachside break! 🏝️
Lovely little caravan park very close to the beach. Amenities block and toilets sparkling clean. Owners could not be more helpful. We enjoyed our stay!
The fact that it's always full is testament to the quality of the Park very well maintained
Nice and clean

Perfect spot ! Franck and Mary are adorable, they managed our multiple extensions with smile and courtesy.
Installations are always clean and the location is amazing. Sport installations near by. Fully recommend :)
Visiting friends staying here. Nice clean park

We only stayed for three nights. The management was awesome, with assistance to reverse the van onto the site provided.

Handy to the beach and a couple of cafes as well.

The amenities were spotlessly clean and the grounds were very neat and tidy.

Would have lives to have a slab as we were dragging a lot of Deco into the van. I guess the rain was not helping in that regard.

Would definitely return and recommend for others to stay. Just a short drive into Bribie.
Best amenities we had in Australia! Small and very nice caravan park with super friendly staff. Camp kitchen is good! And silver spoon on the other side has fantastic food!
If you are looking for a place to park your van or tent for a night, this park is a great option.

Great park.
Very peaceful.
Close to the beach, bus stop and shops.
Facilities were excellent.
Staff were very helpful.
Great quiet little park pub and shops close by , park and the water across the road ..
Small park but nice views on the beach and sea

Friendly staff
Clean amenities
Tent sites very close to camp kitchen and bathrooms
Nice quiet area

It’s a small caravan park and mostly for caravans but they do have some tent camping available.
We camped in our car but so close to everything you need.
Across the road you have the beach, a cafe and within walking distance you have shops with more restaurants and a IGA.
The owners are sooo lovely.
Clean amenities.
Would definitely come back.

We booked in by phone for 2 nights, powered plot. $36.50 per night 2 people.
Tania was very, very pleasant and helpful. When we arrived checking in was very quick & simple. We were given a site map with our plot clearly marked and the code for the facilities, including free WiFi.that actually works. Nigel was there to greet us and guide us to our plot. The park is small and everyone was friendly. It is a quiet place no loud music etc. Pets are not allowed. The camp kitchen has basic equipment and is very clean. The laundry room is fully equipped $4 to use the washing machine. The toilet & shower block are super clean, the best I’ve used. The showers are great, plenty of hanging space for towels & clothes. There’s a few little shops about a 5 minute walk.The lady in Peel & Pantry is lovely and things are reasonably priced. There’s an eating place and a lovely cafe across from the site, once again everyone was very welcoming. There’s a beach about a 3 minute walk from the caravan park. We did a nice beach walk and saw thousands of light blue soldier crabs, it was an amazing thing to see.  Tania & Nigel are great hosts and take pride in the caravan park.Would we stay there again? Most definitely!!

Very nice, tidy, small caravan park. Amenities are very clean. The staff we lovely. Very friendly, and Nigel was happy to help guide you parking the van. Park is located in a quiet spot with only a short walk to the Bribie Passage. There are two cafes very close by and a small gift shop. There are other shops, butchers, and service station also close by. We would go there again.

Gorgeous little caravan park. Mary and her husband were lovely!
Great camp kitchen with kettle, BBQ and microwave. Spotless amenities!
Across the road from 2 cafes. Would definitely stay again!
A beautiful clean little park that every day feels like a Sunday afternoon
Very friendly and accommodating  staff. Park is very quiet. Only across the road to get to the beach. Amenities very very clean. Would definitely recommend and will be coming back.
A good small park reasonably priced and close to Brisbane and other nice tourist attractions
Amazingly managed and sparkling clean  caravan park.
Close to shops, water & takeaway. Staff friendly

As they only have an email address I thought it would take long for them to answer. They were super fast, I booked very easily, the facilities are clean and Tania and the staff were very friendly! Live music just across the street with an amazing bucket of beer and wings. Thank you for this very pleasant stay!

Wow what a friendly little caravan park. It felt like we were camping in The managers Tania and Nigel's backyard. They were super friendly and helpful. The amenities were spotless, the cleanest I have ever seen in fact. Loved our stay there.

Great little van park. Very friendly staff, amenities are sparkling clean and the location is nice and quiet. Two cafes across the road in you need a coffee, breakfast or lunch. A great stay and we'll definately be back.

In four weeks of travelling down the Queensland coast these were the best showers we found. Hot,  great pressure, plenty of room, and a shower curtain that actually worked! Bliss. Also, super close to the beach and nice and quiet.

We only stayed 1 night, but really enjoyed the space.  The caretakers were all super friendly and helpful.  The amenities were very clean,  with nice hot water.  Night time was quiet.  The beach is right across the road,  and also a fantastic cafe/restaurant.
Great park,  very quiet, very clean amenities
A lovely, clean campsite with friendly staff and residents.
Small caravan park but has everything!...walking distance to IGA, Pub, bottle shop, fish'n'chips, beach, coffe shops...AND the most energetic and conscientious Managers I have ever come across .
Good park. Well manages.

This is the second time we've stayed here and each time has been wonderful. Amenities spotless, sites are huge. Only a small park but quiet and perfectly maintained. Just a short walk to local shopping centre. Put it on the 'must visit ' list.

Don't change a thing! You've got the mixture right! I had a great lovely overnight stay, just wish I could have stayed longer. The amenities are spotless and the park was so so quiet. I highly recommend this CP for anyone wanting a get away. Close to town and has a cafe across the road. And right on the waterfront. I'll be back! Great park !!

We had a great stay over the labour day weekend.  The amenities are spotless and the park was so so quiet.  Would highly recommend for anyone wanting a quiet time away.  Close to town and has a cafe across the road.  Great park !!

Great friendly staff, clean and tidy everything.
Great amenities. Walking distance to cafes, and shopping. Skate Park and playground next door with a great park.
Highly recommended. I'll be back.

Back 3 months later and it's even better. Upgraded camp kitchen beautiful green grass. The amenities are kept in pristine condition. Laundry is equally good.
I don't want to leave.

We love it here.  The managers Tania & Nigel are fantastic,  the park is so well maintained & amenities block is spotless. It is a small park & close to the Bay, Cafes & the Hotel which has lovely decor & meals .

We have stayed here on and off for 6 weeks at a time over the last 12 months.  It is a small (around 30 vans), quiet park with good facilities. Close to a small shopping centre, lovely local hotel and other shops. The park Management changed about 6 months ago.  The new Managers Nigel and Tanya are simply the best.  So friendly and will go out of their way to help you. They are brilliant. Additionally, they keep the bathroom facilities extremely clean at all times, the cleanest we have come across in all our travels.  We immensely enjoyed our stay here
The park is clean and tidy.

Friendly
Open spaces

Secure
Great staff, very friendly atmosphere. The facilities were emaculate, would highly recommend to anyone.
Beachmere Caravan Park is surely a worth to visit park, kind of small, but is a great place to visit.
Beachmere Caravan Park may be small, but their new owners are very hospitable and pleasant.
Clean park & amenities decent space for rv's m, lots of clothlines to dry your closthes. Friendly helpful staff, relaxing environment. Close to shops and park. Only down side is no pets
Quiet well managed park. Facilities are always immaculate and grounds are well maintained.
Great place except for the stomy weather on the first night

Great van Park. Nice and quiet, close to the beach with lovely views of Moreton Island and Scarborough. Sandy and Graham are great hosts and very accommodating.
Still coming back still loving it.
Beautiful location, very well kept area. Fantastic place to camp.
Highly recommend ! Great caretakers , amenities spotless , small but very friendly park. No pool, but waking distance to shops , pub , tidal beach and playground. Lovely village feel .
Generous sites, lush green grass.
They let their permanents wander anywhere in the park smoking cigarettes Supposed to be against policy Lies
Great little park, quiet, well maintained & location excellent as you can walk to IGA, cafe's, fish n chips & parks
Nice facilities and a quiet place.
As normal friendly staff and quite

Have had a lovely stay once again at Beachmere caravan park..always clean and tidy..new managers are doing a great job and the caretaker managers have settled in well. The park is very friendly and we have always enjoyed the atmosphere..will be back for Christmas..love it

Stayed here September 2023 in a motor home. Used this site as a base for visiting Australia zoo. Lovely couple from Tasmania running the site couldn't do enough for you ( sorry didn't get their names ) not a huge site but didn't feel squished in. Amenities were clean and tidy. Lovely cafe across the road for breakfast 😋. Ten minute walk to an IGA and other shops also hotel that  does food and has a bar close by. Beach right across the road.
Lovely spot, clean amenities and good size sites
Nice caravan park...amenities clean...love the radio music in them 😊...will be back soon !
Quiet location. The campsite is by the water, with a beautiful sunrise. The owners are helpful and the communal areas are always clean. I would recommend
Great spot well presented will be back again
Fantastic place

It was an awesome stay, owners were lovely,  will be back
again 😊
Awesome park and really nice management, clean facilities well kept park 10/10 for me would recommend to anyone heading up the coast or wish to stay close to Brisbane 😁

So far so good, quiete neat, clean and great hosts.

OK BEEN HERE LONGER NOW
recommended now even more so, if you can get in do it, great well serviced community, two coffee shops with good meals across the road, nice beach that's tidal but still good. IGA and much more.
Picnic in the park
